title: CVE-2010-4429 — CVSS 3.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2010-4429

CVSS Score: 3.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2011-01-19T17:00:01.530
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Agile Core component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 9.3.0.2 and 9.3.1 allows remote authenticated users to affect integrity via unknown vectors related to Web Client, a different vulnerability than CVE-2010-3505.

References: http://osvdb.org/70563, http://secunia.com/advisories/42923, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpujan2011-194091.html
